title: April 2
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|April|hide31=yes}}

'''April 2''' is the 92nd day of the year (93rd in leap years), with 273 days remaining.
</noinclude>
*[[1910s|1914]] – [[Alec Guinness]] is born.
*[[1950s|1945]] – [[Linda Hunt]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[Simon Farnaby]] is born.
*[[1975]] – [[Pedro Pascal]] is born.
*[[1976]] – [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Cantina]] filmed in [[Ajim]].
*[[1980]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 110]] published.
*[[1997]] – [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (TPB)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' trade paperback]] published.
*1997 – [[Star Wars: A New Hope - The Special Edition 4|''Star Wars: A New Hope - The Special Edition'' 4]] published.
*[[2002]] – [[Star Wars Insider 59|''Star Wars Insider'' 59]] is published.
*[[2004]] – "[[Clone Wars Chapter 16]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2005]] – ''[[Galactic Crisis!]]'' published.
*2005 – [[Midnight Madness]] commences.
*2005 – [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith (novelization)|''Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith'' adult novelization]]
*2005 – [[Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith (junior novelization)|''Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith'' junior novelization]]
*2005 – ''[[Star Wars Episode III Revenge of the Sith: Illustrated Screenplay]]'' published.
*2005 – ''[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith Incredible Cross-Sections]]'' published.
*2005 – ''[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith: The Visual Dictionary]]'' published.
*2005 – [[Star Wars: Star Pilot (2005)|''Star Wars: Star Pilot'']] published.
*2005 – ''[[The Last of the Jedi: The Desperate Mission]]'' published.
*2005 – ''[[Ultimate Sticker Book: Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith]]'' published.
*[[2009]] – ''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Mobile Squadrons]]'' released.
*2009 – [[Frank Springer]] dies.
*[[2010]] – "[[Bounty Hunters (episode)|Bounty Hunters]]" airs on Cartoon Network.
*[[2015]] – [[David Esch]] dies.
*[[2019]] – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Old Republic Vol. 3]]'' published.
*[[2020]] – [[Juan Giménez]] dies.
*[[2021]] – ''[[Caravan of Courage: An Ewok Adventure]]'' added to [[Disney+]].
*2021 – [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']] added to [[Disney+]].
*2021 – ''[[Ewoks: The Battle for Endor]]'' added to [[Disney+]].
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'' added to [[Disney+]].
*2021 – ''[[The Story of the Faithful Wookiee]]'' added to [[Disney+]].
*[[2024]] – ''[[I Am Your Mother/Aau's Song]]'' published.
*2024 – ''[[Inquisitor: Rise of the Red Blade]]'' reprinted in paperback.
*2024 – ''[[Star Wars Insider: The High Republic: Tales of Enlightenment]]'' published.
*[[2025]] – [[Hyperspace Stories: The Bad Batch: Ghost Agents 2|''Hyperspace Stories: The Bad Batch: Ghost Agents'' 2]] published.
*[[2026]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Mandalorian Visual Guide]]'' to be published in the UK.
*2026 – [[Journey to Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker: Resistance Heroes (audiobook)|''Journey to Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker: Resistance Heroes'' audiobook]] to be released.
<noinclude>
